subject: A merfolk figure crouching on rocky coastal terrain, wearing shell-and-coral armor, holding a glowing blue orb
description: A mid-shot of a merfolk figure crouching or kneeling on wet rocky terrain at the edge of a coastal bay. The figure has distinctly blue-green skin and clearly pointed ears, with webbed hands visible. The armor is constructed from shells and coral — cream and bone-colored spiked pauldrons, layered chest pieces, and fin-like protrusions at the shoulders and forearms. One hand holds a small glowing blue orb. The figure's posture is alert and forward-leaning, as if surveying or guiding. The background opens into a wide turquoise bay flanked by rocky cliffs, with distant sails visible on the water. The palette is dominated by vivid blue-greens in both the figure's coloration and the environment.
foreground: wet rocks, tidal pools, green-lit coral terrain
background: turquoise bay, rocky cliffs, distant sails
